invariants.description: Every directly-invoked hook script must be executable. Sourced subscripts (helpers/safety/*, lifecycle/stop/*, pretooluse/bash/*) are excluded from the glob since `source` does not require +x.
Every TOP-LEVEL hook script (the ones the event-kernel dispatcher calls directly) must be referenced in tools/HME/event_kernel/dispatcher.js.
invariants.context: Every TOP-LEVEL hook script (the ones the event-kernel dispatcher calls directly) must be referenced in tools/HME/event_kernel/dispatcher.js. Adapter scripts and sub-dispatched scripts (posttooluse_addknowledge.sh, posttooluse_hme_*.sh, posttooluse_write.sh, pretooluse_check_pipeline.sh) are invoked outside this routing table -- they're excluded from this check and verified separately by their callers.

invariants.description: Stop chain must register every critical enforcement policy
_safety.sh must source every split helper module that defines the hook safety functions
Plugin hooks.json must be valid JSON
NEXUS state helper must exist for edit tracking hooks
hooks/hooks.json must register hooks for all 7 lifecycle events
hooks.json must route every Claude event through event_kernel/claude_adapter.js -- the single adapter for proxy-up and direct fallback dispatch
_tab_helpers.sh must exist; posttooluse_bash, posttooluse_addknowledge, and posttooluse_write still source it.
Every directly-invoked hook script must be documented in tools/HME/hooks/README.md
_nexus.sh must define all 10 lifecycle state functions
_tab_helpers.sh must define all 4 compact tab functions

Hook scripts that emit Claude-facing briefings (KB CONSTRAINTS, AGENT PRIMER, ANTI-POLLING, etc.) must use `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` (on allow) or `permissionDecisionReason` (on deny), not `systemMessage`...
invariants.born_from: incident: hook briefings emitted only as systemMessage did not reach the model
invariants.context: Hook scripts that emit Claude-facing briefings (KB CONSTRAINTS, AGENT PRIMER, ANTI-POLLING, etc.) must use `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` (on allow) or `permissionDecisionReason` (on deny), not `systemMessage` alone. systemMessage is user-terminal-only; a briefing hook that emits only systemMessage never reaches Claude  this silently gutted the entire pretooluse_edit briefing chain for months.

invariants.description: Shell hooks must not wrap `source <infrastructure-file>` in silent-swallow suffixes (`2>/dev/null || true`, `|| true`).
invariants.context: Shell hooks must not wrap `source <infrastructure-file>` in silent-swallow suffixes (`2>/dev/null || true`, `|| true`). The _safety.sh .env-path bug hid for months behind `source X 2>/dev/null || true` because the missing file failed invisibly, leaving PROJECT_ROOT unset in every hook. Infrastructure sources must fail loud or use explicit `[ -f X ] && source X` guard.

invariants.description: posttooluse_hme_review.sh must extract depth meter count and write REVIEW_ISSUES to nexus
posttooluse_hme_review.sh must parse the canonical HME_REVIEW_VERDICT marker that onboarding_chain.emit_review_verdict_marker() emits.
invariants.context: posttooluse_hme_review.sh must parse the canonical HME_REVIEW_VERDICT marker that onboarding_chain.emit_review_verdict_marker() emits. Drift between the two caused clean reviews to fall into REVIEW_PARSE_FAILED until the hook regex was updated.

invariants.description: Every hook that consumes hme-cli output must grep for the '^hme-cli:' prefix to distinguish transport failure from content. Removing this check silently lets a failed CLI call masquerade as a successful one.
_nexus_pending() must check REVIEW_ISSUES count and block stop when count > 3
Post-write side effects must be owned by proxy middleware and emit write-coherence events on changed tracked files.
invariants.born_from: 2026-05-16 post-write side effects moved from hook fragments to proxy middleware

invariants.description: post-write proxy side effects must classify writes against the staleness index
